entities.name: CHICKPEA

entities.description: A disease that has caused a decreasing trend in chickpea area

entities.description: An insect pest that has caused a decreasing trend in chickpea area

entities.name: YIELD

entities.description: An on-farm approach for managing pests and diseases in chickpea

entities.name: AGRONOMICAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Improved farming techniques integrated with IPM for sustainable production

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of maintaining chickpea cultivation through integrated management
